tasks.title: Persist ticket assignment to SQLite
tasks.description: Extend SQLiteTicketStore to handle PATCH /api/tickets/:id/assignee writes, updating the assignee column and returning the updated ticket. Ensure the in‑memory store remains unchanged and the store complies with the TicketStore interface.
tasks.design_notes: Reuse the assignTicket method signature from MemoryTicketStore. Add an UPDATE statement in the SQLite adapter with proper transaction handling. Run migrations to add an `assignee` column if missing. Return the ticket via the existing contract shape.
tasks.advice: Add a migration to create/alter the `assignee` column, then implement `assignTicket` in `SQLiteTicketStore` using an UPDATE statement and return the updated ticket.

tasks.title: Wire server to select TicketStore via env var
tasks.description: Introduce SERVER_STORE env variable to switch between MemoryTicketStore and SQLiteTicketStore at startup, and inject the selected store into Express routes.
tasks.design_notes: Create a storeFactory function in server/app.ts that reads process.env.SERVER_STORE (default to memory). Refactor route handlers to depend on an abstract TicketStore instance. Add validation for unknown values.
tasks.advice: Create a `storeFactory` in `server/app.ts` that reads `process.env.SERVER_STORE` (default to memory) and returns the appropriate `TicketStore` instance. Refactor routes to accept the injected store.

tasks.title: Implement saved views API and DB schema
tasks.description: Create REST endpoints (GET /api/views, POST /api/views, DELETE /api/views/:id) for agents to store custom ticket filter configurations. Persist definitions in a new SQLiteSavedViews table.
tasks.design_notes: Define SavedView contract in shared/contracts.ts. Add migration script to create table with columns: id (PK), userId, name, filterJson. Implement SQLiteSavedViewsStore with CRUD methods and expose via router. Guard routes with basic auth placeholder.
tasks.advice: Define a `SavedView` contract, add migration for `SQLiteSavedViews` table, and implement CRUD methods in a new `SQLiteSavedViewsStore`. Expose the routes via an Express router.

tasks.title: Add saved views UI component
tasks.description: Build a React SavedViews panel allowing agents to create, list, and delete saved filter sets, calling the new API endpoints.
tasks.design_notes: Create SavedViews.tsx component, integrate with existing TicketList filters, use shared/api.ts for calls, and store view list in component state. Show modal for creating a view with name and filter JSON preview.
tasks.advice: After the saved‑views API is in place, build a `SavedViews.tsx` component that calls the endpoints, manages local state, and integrates with the ticket list filters.

tasks.title: Complete admin authentication middleware
tasks.description: Finish the placeholder auth middleware to verify JWTs, extract admin claims, and reject non‑admin requests with 403 on audit‑related routes.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage jsonwebtoken library, read secret from ENV, validate token signature, check payload.role === 'admin'. Register middleware only on /api/audit/* routes. Add unit tests for success and failure cases.
tasks.advice: Implement JWT verification with the `jsonwebtoken` library, read the secret from an env var, check `payload.role === 'admin'`, and attach the middleware to `/api/audit/*`. Add unit tests for success and failure cases.

tasks.title: Add audit log endpoint and admin UI panel
tasks.description: Create GET /api/audit that returns recent audit entries from SQLiteAuditLog table. Build an admin‑only React panel to display logs.
tasks.design_notes: Define AuditEntry contract. Implement SQLiteAuditLogStore with insert and fetchRecent(limit). Secure route with admin auth middleware. In frontend, add AuditLog.tsx component, render conditionally based on user.role, and poll or refresh on demand.
tasks.advice: Create an `SQLiteAuditLogStore` with `insert` and `fetchRecent` methods, secure the GET `/api/audit` route with the admin middleware, and add a React `AuditLog.tsx` panel that renders for admin users.

tasks.title: End‑to‑end tests for saved views and audit log
tasks.description: Write Vitest/Supertest integration tests covering saved view CRUD operations and audit log retrieval, including auth enforcement.
tasks.design_notes: Spin up an in‑memory SQLite DB for test runs, seed with sample data, mock JWTs for admin and regular users. Verify response structures and status codes. Ensure CI runs migrations before tests.
tasks.advice: Write end‑to‑end Vitest/Supertest tests for the saved‑views CRUD and audit‑log endpoints, including JWT auth scenarios. Spin up an in‑memory SQLite DB for the test runs.

tasks.title: Implement ticket assignment endpoint
tasks.description: Add PATCH /api/tickets/:id/assignee handler that validates the request payload, updates the ticket in the store, and returns the updated ticket or appropriate error codes.
tasks.design_notes: Use existing Zod validation utilities, return HTTP 200 with the updated ticket JSON to keep response shape consistent across APIs.

tasks.description: Extend MemoryTicketStore to support updating a ticket's assignee field while preserving in‑memory state and emitting events for consistency.
tasks.design_notes: Introduce a new assignTicket(id, assignee) method that conforms to the TicketStore interface; ensure existing get/set methods remain unchanged.

tasks.design_notes: Leverage shared/api.ts for type‑safe calls; update local component state on success to avoid a full page reload; reuse existing TicketDetail component styling.

tasks.design_notes: Use better-sqlite3 for synchronous queries; place migration scripts under db/migrations; ensure the store implements the same TicketStore interface for seamless swapping.

tasks.description: Complete the placeholder auth middleware to verify JWT admin claims and reject non‑admin requests with 403 on audit‑related endpoints.
tasks.design_notes: Reuse existing auth utilities; add role checking logic; register middleware only on /api/audit routes to keep other endpoints unaffected.

tasks.description: Create GET /api/audit that returns recent audit entries from SQLite and display them in a new admin‑only panel in the React dashboard.
tasks.design_notes: Persist audit records via a dedicated SQLiteAuditLog table; conditionally render the panel based on user.role === 'admin'; use shared/api.ts for fetching logs.

tasks.description: Update `.github/workflows/ci.yml` to run database migrations before executing tests so that the SQLite schema (including the `assignee` column) is always up‑to‑date.
